source_policy: Public visitor and learner-facing UI strings. Excludes wp-admin, REST/CLI/admin tooling, front-end manager-only settings, recorder queue management, and teacher-class management. Includes language switching, auth, public lesson/card/game/dictionary surfaces, learner progress, hidden-category controls, and learner study preferences.
